title: Global CBRN Defense Laboratory Benchmark Atlas
status: Workbook-structured v1 starter. Not a fully source-verified public benchmark.
methodology: Labs are included when public evidence or strong candidate indicators show relevance to anti/control/defense CBRN, CBRN item checking/calibration/testing, or CBRN defense R&D. Scores are transparent weighted indicators and must be updated as sources are validated.
